sections.paragraph:
an unused root. i.q. זוּד, זִיד pr. to boil up as water, hence generally-

(1) to be troubled, disturbed. Syr. Pa. ܕܰܘܶܕ to disturb, to agitate. Hence דּוּד a pot, Syr. ܕܘܽܕܳܐ a kettle.

(2) to love, i.q. יָדַד, وَدَّ. Hence דֹּוד love, דּוּדָאִים, and the pr.n. דָּוִד, אֶלְדָּד (“whom God loves”), דֹּודֹו, דֹּודַי.
